name: paykh
description: PayKH — Developer-first Bakong KHQR payment gateway for Cambodia

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @paykh/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @paykh/security
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @paykh/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:packages && npm run dev:worker --workspace @paykh/api
scripts.db:seed: npm run build:packages && npm run db:seed --workspace @paykh/api
